# `sesam verify --forge-check` runs cleanly when no forge-backed users exist:
# age-key users have no upstream keys to re-fetch. Detecting real upstream drift
# needs a live forge, which is out of scope for the offline test suite.

exec git init
exec git config user.email test@sesam.dev
exec git config user.name 'Sesam Test'

exec sesam init --user admin
exec git add -A
exec git commit -m 'init sesam'

exec sesam tell --user bob --recipient $BOB_PUBKEY --group dev

exec sesam verify --forge-check
stderr 'Forge Check: ok'
